title: scuticaria peruviana
intro: Scuticaria peruviana, also known as Scutellaria peruviana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the butterfly pepper plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Scuticaria peruviana include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
